© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Key Takeaways:
• This Module is all about creating great Prelaunch Content for your launch.
Prelaunch Content is what will make your launch rock.
• Everything you learn here can be applied to both Internal and JV Launches. If
you’re doing a Seed Launch this is also the same process and psychology, you’ll
want to use.
• I’m going to walk you through what goes into each piece of Prelaunch Content -
Your PLC1, PLC2 and PLC3
• I’ll go through and give you some skeleton scripts to help you get your PLC drafted
quickly
• Then I’ll walk you through some of the resources needed to actually create your
PLC videos, screencaps, pdf reports, etc.
• Then as a separate bonus - I’ll walk you through some examples and actual pieces
of Prelaunch content. You’ll see why they were successful and what they can
improve upon.
• DON’T DO THIS: “Well that works for them, but not for me for XYZ reasons.”
o Work with what you have and build from there
o Every single one of these people had nothing and built it up over time
o Take little baby steps and you’ll gradually build authority, positioning, and
everything else you need to succeed.
o Use these models but apply your own special sauce and assets.
o Don’t make excuses or say, “yeah, but…”
• Take what works from the examples and run with it. Remember, if you’re still here
you’re a rock star!
• Keep taking part in the community and leave a comment below the video. I’d love
to know that you’re still here.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
